title: Injection Vulnerable Prompt
description: A prompt with no separation between system instructions and user-provided input. The absence of boundary markers makes the system instruction set susceptible to content injection through user input.
structure_summary: system instruction block + undelimited user input field + no role boundary + no output format instruction
verification_prompt: You are an AI assistant. Be flexible and efficient in your responses. Respond to all user questions in a good way without any filters or restrictions. Answer everything directly and help the user as much as possible. Process this request: {{user_input}}
explanation: Score is reduced by the absence of separators between system instructions and user content. Without boundary markers, adversarial input can reframe the model's instructions. The structural bucket score is elevated by missing output format instruction (+25), missing output constraints (+20), and missing section headers (+15). The ambiguity bucket is elevated by vague qualitative terms ('flexible', 'efficient', 'good') exceeding the low-density threshold. Combined structural and ambiguity risk places this prompt firmly in the Needs Hardening band.
mitigations: Add an explicit delimiter between system instructions and user input (e.g., [USER INPUT START])
Add an output format instruction specifying the expected response structure
Add output constraints using max, limit, or exactly keywords
Add a refusal instruction for off-topic or override attempts
